reviews.review_description: So I cant get further then the lock pick. I even somehow got to the door that needed picked. But there was no real explanation on how to do it and again got killed. I don't think ANYONE has beat this game. Not one video walkthru that gets past that part. So what's up??

I think you [the devs] know what needs to be done. It’s definitely going to stand out among the VR Horror titles. I couldn’t get past the doctor after the “Mosquito Bite” scene due to him running in place and then killing me when I let him get unstuck lol

Ultra settings shouldn’t be available for the Quest 2 because the performance is volatile to the hardware. I’ll give it 5 if it improves- I’m sure it will!
This is really atmospheric.  Gory brilliant graphics. And the creepy background sounds. Christ it’s eerie but in a great way. Mechanics not too bad

I want so bad to play this more but after a few minutes, I want to throw up because there don’t seem to be any settings for motion sickness, which I get pretty bad. Love the atmosphere and puzzles but it’s just not playable for me until there are at least SOME motion options (please let me know devs if I’m missing something and I’ll change my review). If you don’t get motion sick, definitely give this one a try! Love the style.
Good graphics, enough tension to rattle your nerves. The tutorial, however, is not great at all. Point, click, hope you're right.
